commands.review_summary:
The branch adds empty-transcript preflight compaction recovery, broadens `sessions cleanup --fix-missing` to prune empty/header-only transcript rows, updates docs, and adds regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +72, Tests +47, Docs 0. Total +119 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: no. live high-confidence reproduction path was established in this review; the issue trigger is probabilistic. Source inspection shows the current-main no-op compaction result can fall through as a failed recovery, and the PR's targeted test models that path.
commands.review_followup: Human review is needed for the missing central real proof and the compatibility-sensitive cleanup semantics; there is no narrow automated code repair to queue.

target.title: fix(sessions): recover empty preflight compaction
target.body:
## Summary
- Treat the specific preflight compaction result `ok: true`, `compacted: false`, `reason: no real conversation messages` as stale session token metadata instead of a hard compaction failure.
- Reset the context snapshot to 0 and retry the prompt so an empty/header-only transcript can self-heal on the next inbound message.
- Extend `openclaw sessions cleanup --fix-missing` to prune empty or header-only transcript rows, and document that repair behavior.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run.overflow-compaction.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run.empty-error-retry.test.ts src/agents/command/session-store.test.ts src/config/sessions/store.pruning.integration.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/discord/src/monitor/message-handler.preflight.test.ts`
- real local cleanup proof command shown below

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: an over-budget session entry with an empty/header-only transcript no longer bounces every message after preflight compaction returns `no real conversation messages`; cleanup also repairs the empty-present transcript case.
Real environment tested: local macOS checkout, Node/tsx runtime, real temporary `sessions.json`, and a real header-only transcript containing a stale `totalTokens: 2000000` session row.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: created a temporary `sessions.json` with `agent:main:discord:channel:proof`, a header-only `deadlock-session.jsonl`, and stale token metadata; ran `runSessionsCleanup(... fixMissing: true ...)` in dry-run and apply modes; also ran the targeted Vitest suites listed above.
Evidence after fix: copied terminal output from the local cleanup proof command:
```text
dry_run missing=1 after=0 keyFlagged=true
applied missing=1 remainingKeys=0
```
Observed result after fix: `--fix-missing` detects the header-only stale-token session row before mutating, then removes it when applied. The runner regression also passed, proving `no real conversation messages` preflight compaction retries instead of surfacing an error with `compactionTokensAfter: 0`.
What was not tested: a live Discord model-fallback reproduction was not forced; the core state-machine deadlock, cleanup repair path, and Discord preflight surface were verified locally with deterministic tests and a real temp session store.

Fixes #87016.

If this PR is squash/reworked, please preserve author attribution or include:
Co-authored-by: Andy Ye <35905412+TurboTheTurtle@users.noreply.github.com>
